title: Disable Oritech Ores
description: Disables Oritech ores from generating in all dimensions
body:
## **Disable Oritech Ores**  

### **Features**  
- **Removes all Oritech ores** from world generation  
- **No performance impact**  
- **Compatible with new & existing worlds** (existing Oritech ores in already-generated chunks will remain unless removed manually)  
- Perfect for **modpacks** where Oritech is included but its ores are not desired  

### **Why use this mod?**  
- Maintain balance in your custom modpack  
- Reduce block clutter underground  
- Keep your ore distribution exactly how you want it  

### **Compatibility**  
- Works with **NeoForge and Fabric** (although you don't need this in Fabric, it's in the configs)  
- Fully compatible with all world generation mods  
- Does **not** remove Oritech items, machines, or other content (only the ores in world generation).
